subject: English
overall_learning_objectives: Critically analyse the theme of empathy and social responsibility in the poem
Interpret poetic imagery, symbolism, and tone
Compare character behaviours and evaluate moral choices
Understand how poetic structure and devices convey meaning
Relate the poem’s message to real-life social situations
Develop analytical reading and creative writing skills

lesson_plan.title: Exploring Empathy and Social Awareness
topics_covered: Role of individuals in building a caring society
student_activities: Discuss real-life situations where elderly people may need help
Debate whether people today show enough empathy in society

lesson_plan.title: Close Reading and Interpretation of the Poem
teaching_strategy: Teacher-led close reading of the poem
student_activities: Identify phrases that describe the environment
Interpret how the winter setting reflects the woman’s struggle

lesson_plan.title: Character Behaviour and Social Commentary
topics_covered: Behaviour of the group of boys
teaching_strategy: Teacher explanation of moral perspective in literature
student_activities: Compare the attitudes of the boys and the young helper
Discuss why people sometimes ignore those who need help

lesson_plan.title: Symbolism and Turning Point
student_activities: Role-play the scene where the boy helps the woman
Explain the symbolic meaning of the title

lesson_plan.title: Theme and Ethical Reflection
student_activities: Write a reflective paragraph on the poem’s message
Discuss how individual actions can influence society

lesson_plan.title: Poetic Devices, Structure and Creative Extension
student_activities: Identify poetic devices in the poem
Write a short poem or diary entry from the old woman’s perspective

teaching_aids: Illustrations depicting scenes from the poem
teacher_tip: Encourage students to think about the poem from multiple perspectives. Ask them how the story might change if they were one of the boys who ignored the woman. This helps students develop empathy and deeper literary understanding.
